MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of judgment debtor, Ricardo L. Arrieta aka Ricardo Arrieta is GRANTED. Court orders any earnings or personal property held by the Sheriff returned to the judgment debtor. Written order is signed and filed.
